mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log (operation_type, target_table, target_id, before_value, after_value, operated_by, operated_at) VALUES (#{operationType}, #{targetTable}, #{targetId}, #{beforeValue}::jsonb, #{afterValue}::jsonb, #{operatedBy}, #{operatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT log_id, operation_type, target_table, target_id, before_value::text AS before_value, after_value::text AS after_value, operated_by, operated_at FROM operation_log WHERE 1 = 1
AND operation_type ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{operationType}, '%')
AND operated_by ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatedBy}, '%')
AND operated_at >= #{operatedAtFrom}::timestamp
AND operated_at < (#{operatedAtTo}::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
ORDER BY operated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM operation_log WHERE 1 = 1
AND operation_type ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{operationType}, '%')
AND operated_by ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatedBy}, '%')
AND operated_at >= #{operatedAtFrom}::timestamp
AND operated_at < (#{operatedAtTo}::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
